title: Completed Blocksets
description: A simple mod that adds in some of vanilla's seemingly missing blocks. Includes 220+ blocks!
body:
![Completed Blocksets Title Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/162d35bd1ed88165b13760c2b358270dea24c8af.png)

### **Support The Mod!**
[![ko-fi](https://ko-fi.com/img/githubbutton_sm.svg)](https://ko-fi.com/R7F720MP5G)

## About
This mod adds blocks that are seemingly missing from vanilla's block sets. The additions are meant to be very vanilla-friendly, and for the most part re-use vanilla minecraft textures aside from a few exceptions. This mod currently includes **226 blocks in total**

This mod is also available on [CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/completed-blocksets)

## **Features**

  - Slab
- Calcite

  - Slab
  - Wall

    - Wall

### **Other Changes**
- **Replaced vanilla End Stone Bricks crafting recipe with Polished End Stone crafting recipe.** Four End Stone now crafts four Polished End Stone, and four Polished Endstone crafts four End Stone Bricks.
- Added custom-made textures for block sets that were not present in any form in vanilla (Polished Calcite, Polished Endstone, Gold blockset, )
- Added all blocks to vanilla's creative mode tabs, as well as a separate "Completed Blocksets" tab.
